prompt: A refined Japanese fashion magazine editorial cover set inside a bright modern office corridor, featuring a full-body portrait of a beautiful professional woman walking confidently toward the camera. She wears a sleek monochrome gray office outfit: a fitted ribbed mock-neck short-sleeve knit top with a diagonal shoulder strap detail accented by 4 metallic buttons, a high-waisted gray pencil skirt, and a matching gray belt with a rectangular buckle. She carries a folder and documents in one hand, with the other arm relaxed mid-stride. Her hair is long, dark brown, and styled in a thick side braid draped over one shoulder, with soft neat bangs. The mood is elegant, mature, feminine, and quietly powerful. The setting is a sophisticated open-plan office with glass meeting rooms on the left, desks and seated coworkers on the right, soft daylight mixed with clean overhead office lighting, subtle indoor plants, and a shallow depth of field that keeps the woman sharply in focus while the background remains softly blurred. Compose the image vertically like a premium magazine cover, with the model centered and occupying most of the frame from head to knees, polished editorial retouching, realistic fabric texture, flattering natural skin tones, and understated luxury styling. Overlay stylish magazine typography in Japanese and English: a large serif headline reading Update across the upper left, smaller Japanese copy above it, a script subtitle reading "The Office Muse," a right-side teaser block with "NEW BASIC, NEW ME.", a left feature block titled "Focus on DETAIL", a mid-left article box titled "My Work Style", a lower-right feature titled "Style Tip", a small right-side box titled "Scene PRESENTATION DAY", a circular callout near the lower left reading "CHECK!", and small footer text with page number 25. Use a luxury fashion magazine aesthetic, clean layout, restrained grayscale palette, editorial balance between text and subject, realistic photography, high detail, soft contrast, and an aspirational office-wear campaign feel.
